creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text: I still think there's value in switching to CMake for those libraries. I've also worked with upstream so we can have a very lightly patched version in tree, this https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/ftp/curl/files/patch-lib-urldata.h is the only patch needed so can we at least wait until next release? I also have a patch ready if one want to test it before next upstream release.
